title: Transfer JSON summary pattern to new schema
instruction:
Read `LESSON.md` — it describes how a prior similar task built `summary.json` from `data.json`.

Apply the same aggregation pattern to THIS workspace's `data.json`, but the output schema here uses `totals` (not `summary`).

Write `totals.json` with:
- `count`: number of records
- `sum`: sum of `value` fields
- `labels`: sorted unique `label` values

Run `node verify-local.js` to check your work.
